name: rds
title: RDS Visible-State Graph
subtitle: Buttons + readonly selects; HA read replica hides General-purpose; instance spec select options depend on class

states.title: MySQL / Yearly-Monthly (default class)
controls: DB Instance Type: Primary/Standby | Single | Read replica | HA read replica
DB Instance Class: General-purpose | Dedicated [typical start: General-purpose]
select: Instance specification (vCPU/RAM) — list A for General-purpose

states.title: MySQL / Yearly / Dedicated selected
controls: DB Instance Type: Primary/Standby | Single | Read replica | HA read replica
DB Instance Class: General-purpose | Dedicated [current: Dedicated]
select: Instance specification — list B (different sizes than General-purpose)

states.title: MySQL / Yearly / HA read replica
controls: DB Instance Type: Primary/Standby | Single | Read replica | HA read replica [current: HA read replica]
DB Instance Class: Dedicated only (General-purpose not offered)

states.title: MySQL / Pay-per-use (default class)
controls: DB Instance Type: Primary/Standby | Single | Read replica | HA read replica | Proxy
select: Instance specification — list depends on class

states.title: MySQL / Pay-per-use / Dedicated selected
controls: DB Instance Type: Primary/Standby | Single | Read replica | HA read replica | Proxy
DB Instance Class: General-purpose | Dedicated [current: Dedicated]
select: Instance specification — alternate size list

states.title: MySQL / Pay-per-use / HA read replica
controls: DB Instance Type: … | HA read replica | Proxy [current: HA read replica]

states.title: PostgreSQL / Yearly-Monthly
controls: DB Instance Type: Primary/Standby | Single | Read replica
select: Instance specification + Storage etc. — option lists depend on class

states.title: PostgreSQL / Pay-per-use
controls: DB Instance Type: Primary/Standby | Single | Read replica
select: Instance specification + Storage — lists depend on class
